---
species: "Unknown Brown Blade"
accepted_code: "UBBL"
alternate_codes: 
diminutive: "BLD"
alternate_diminutives: ["", ""]
common_name: ""
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Any brown algae with blades"
image: '/header_images/unknown_bbl_outershores.jpg'
categories:
  - brown algae
  - unknown
sampling_programs:
    - keen_quad
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_bruv
    - lsw_quad
    - lsw_microquad
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 830
---

![](/header_images/unknown_bbl_outershores.jpg)
PHOTO CREDIT https://theoutershores.com/bio/animals-plants-and-algae/marine-algae/brown-algae-ochrophyta/


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** Any  brown algae with blades that you are unsure about any taxonomy. Could be singular or multiple blades. BLD for juveniles (e.g., kelps that are too small to ID)
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** The image chosen does contain Fucus spp, but a lot of times juvenile fucus is really difficult to ID in the field so using UBBL and marking juvenile in the notes section is helpful.

<!-- link to worms page -->
